user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Sorry to hear that. Can you describe what changed? | Customer: The back of the car has a dent now. It was not there before. | Support: Did anything else break or is it mostly body damage? | Customer: Mostly the rear bumper area. I attached the photo I took this morning.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The submitted image is sufficient to evaluate the claim on the rear_bumper.
claim_status_justification: The image shows the rear of a silver car with significant damage to the rear bumper and trunk area, including a large dent. This matches the customer's claim of a dent on the back of the car, specifically in the rear bumper area.
